revision.comment: 「[[Template:Category other]]」の保護設定を変更しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]] ([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_other here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_other for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:
  <noinclude><!-- If no or empty "demospace" parameter then detect namespace --></noinclude>
  {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{demospace|}}}
  | {{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc: {{{demospace}}} }}    <noinclude><!-- Use lower case "demospace" --></noinclude>
  | {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>NAMESPACE}}|{{safesubst:<noinclude/>ns:Category}}
    | category
    | other
    }}
  }}
| category = {{{1|}}}
| other
| #default = {{{2|}}}
}}<noinclude><!-- End switch -->

{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>
